objective: Durably require self-serve Human verification checklist rows in non-trivial PR bodies and new-project playbooks. Rows must include focus area, exact source/data/artifact, official URL and verified/accessed date where facts can change, pass/fail criteria, and residual-risk owner. High-risk triggers include provider/tool cost and terms, latency/capacity/quota/retry, UX/demo/recruiter flow, security/privacy/consent/deletion/disclosure/provenance, and AI/RAG/eval/citation/generated-media binding. Failure IDs: HUMAN-HV-MISSING-001, HUMAN-HV-VAGUE-001, HUMAN-HV-NO-PASSFAIL-001, HUMAN-HV-OWNER-001, HUMAN-HV-HIGHRISK-001, HUMAN-HV-DELEGATION-001, HUMAN-HV-NEWPROJECT-001, HV-SCOPE-001, NONGOAL-PARSER-001. Non-goals: no runtime/product/provider/media/hosted/CI parser implementation, no provider selection or spend approval, and no PR #230 branch mutation. Evidence: docs/template, playbook, guardrail/quality docs, status ledger, local gates, forced PR-body guardrail, and fresh-context fan-out dispositions.
